description: True oceanfront estate on Jupiter Island spanning a full acre with 200 feet of pristine beach frontage. This magnificent property features sweeping Atlantic Ocean views from nearly every room, a resort-style heated pool and spa, private beach access with dune walkover, and lush tropical landscaping providing complete privacy. The chef's kitchen, multiple living areas, and guest suites make this ideal for both grand entertaining and intimate family gatherings.

Stunning Intracoastal waterfront estate set on 1.5 acres of lush tropical landscaping. This private retreat offers a deep water dock with boat lift, full water and electric hookups, and direct Intracoastal Waterway access. The property includes deeded beach access and is tucked away at the end of a quiet cul-de-sac on Jupiter Island, offering unparalleled privacy and the ultimate boating lifestyle.

Spectacular family compound on 2.2 acres with 242 feet of direct ocean frontage in the heart of Jupiter Island. Three completely renovated structures built to current building codes, offering 11 bedrooms and 12 bathrooms total. This is one of the most significant oceanfront estates available in South Florida, with resort-scale grounds, multiple pools, and absolute beachfront privacy.

Elevated waterfront luxury townhome with private elevator, private boat dock, and panoramic river views. This premier multi-level residence spans 2,049 square feet and seamlessly blends high-end custom upgrades with the ultimate coastal lifestyle. Gleaming wood floors, abundant natural light, automatic remote-controlled blinds, and a fireplace complement the direct waterfront access from your private dock.

Extraordinary new construction estate nestled on 3.29 gated acres along the banks of the Cape Fear River. Thoughtfully designed to maximize privacy, comfort, and panoramic water views, this showpiece home delivers an unparalleled living experience just minutes from the heart of Wilmington. Over 4,369 square feet of elegantly appointed space with an additional 439 heated square feet on the lower level including a full bath and flex room. Custom millwork, designer lighting, and wide-plank flooring throughout.

Waterfront home with a private dock and stunning Intracoastal views in the highly desirable gated Inlet Point Harbor community. Enjoy direct access to the Intracoastal Waterway from your private dock featuring a drive-on boat slip and deep water year-round. Beautifully maintained with an open floor plan, spacious primary suite on the main floor, and custom professional closet systems. Recently renovated bathrooms and updated systems throughout.

Coastal delight perched above Narragansett Bay where the water greets you upon entering. Perfectly set amid tranquil grounds on a cul-de-sac, this home presents the ultimate coastal escape. With direct beach access and a mooring included, this is a prime example of waterfront living in one of Rhode Island's most sought-after neighborhoods. Panoramic water views from the main living areas and updated interior throughout.

Exceptionally rare waterfront home in coveted Governor Francis Farms with direct water access. Only a handful of homes in this historic neighborhood enjoy direct access to the water, allowing you to launch a kayak or paddleboard right from your own backyard and enjoy the protected cove. This beautifully maintained property offers spacious living areas with water views, updated kitchen and baths, and a private backyard that slopes gently to the water's edge.

Sound Front retreat set high above the shoreline on 2.45 acres with 200 feet of direct beachfront. Angled so the water is the constant — nearly every room, every day, every season. Floor-to-ceiling glass pulls in the light while bluestone accents, wide ash plank floors, and three fireplaces keep it warm and grounded. The chef's kitchen with butler's pantry is as timeless as it is functional. Outside, the 50-foot heated pool overlooks the Long Island Sound with unobstructed views to Connecticut.

Perfectly positioned along scenic Long Creek with views toward the Preserve, this 4-bedroom waterfront home delivers a relaxed coastal lifestyle. Set on three-quarters of an acre with lush mature landscaping and generous water frontage, the property is ideal for kayaking, paddleboarding, sailing, jet skiing, and fishing — creating a true creekside retreat. Light-filled open layout with thoughtfully designed gathering spaces and a spacious kitchen with stainless steel appliances.

Gulf-front luxury investment property with 75.7 feet of private beachfront and no HOA. This turnkey property offers 3,116 square feet of living space with 3 bedrooms and 4 bathrooms, sleeping 12+ guests. Currently producing strong rental income as a vacation rental. Direct Gulf of Mexico beach access from the property with unobstructed sunset views. Can serve as either a private coastal escape or a high-performing income producer.

Charming lakefront escape on beautiful Lake Desolation. This cozy 3-bedroom, 1-bath home offers 814 square feet of living space and 64 feet of direct waterfront. Panoramic lake views from nearly every room. Perfect as a year-round residence or weekend getaway. Direct access to the lake for swimming, fishing, kayaking, and canoeing. The quintessential Adirondack-region lake cottage.

Experience the ultimate lakeside lifestyle on Owasco Lake. Situated on a generous lot with 105 feet of frontage, this home offers a front-row seat to the water and spectacular Fourth of July fireworks views. Updated kitchen with granite counters, hardwood floors throughout the main level, and a screened porch overlooking the lake. Private dock with boat hoist and sandy beach area for swimming.

Spacious near-new construction canal-front home in the East Rockaway waterfront community. This raised residence features five generously sized bedrooms, three full baths, a full-height basement with radiant heat and tremendous potential for additional living space. One of the largest and most luxurious homes in the canal-front community with direct water access from the backyard.

Discover your private beach retreat in this exceptional waterfront home perfectly positioned with shore-to-shore access between the Long Island Sound and Duck Island Bay. Breathtaking panoramic views and water access from both the front and back of the property. This rare gem offers the ultimate coastal lifestyle with a private sandy beach on the Long Island Sound and calm protected waters of the bay for kayaking and paddleboarding.
